metadata.description: Personal Claude Code plugins by Chris Prather

plugins.name: commonplacebook
plugins.description: Semantic search and journaling for zk notebooks. Adds keyword, semantic, and similar-note search plus a daily journal interview command.

plugins.name: crochet
plugins.description: Intelligence layer for git-zhi. Refinement, assessment, import, reporting, onboarding, pushback, and alignment skills for managing development work as dependency chains.

plugins.name: perl-development
plugins.description: Agentic Perl development — version-aware code generation, Test2 testing, dependency management, static analysis, and regression testing. PVM is the reference backend.
